svg.title: kastellan — Request flow through the security layers
svg.desc: Vertical flowchart of a user instruction from channel ingress through plan formulation, CASSANDRA review pipeline (Stages -1..4), dispatcher chokepoint, sandboxed worker execution, egress proxy, and response — with block, advisory, and escalation branches.
svg.text: from user instruction to final output (or CASSANDRA blockage)
authenticate sender, normalise, forward to core
each stage may exit early; one verdict per plan
user may resubmit a fixed plan
may raise Tier 2 or heighten verify
for each step in approved plan ↻
own OS process · own scratch FS · no Postgres
tool executes → returns result over JSON-RPC stdio
denied syscall → SIGSYS · denied FS → EACCES
